allow:
Bash(cat <<'EOF'
Documented plugins to find:
http, grpc, centrifuge, service, server, locks, tcp, amqp, kafka, nats, sqs, beanstalk, boltdb, memory, kv, redis, memcached, otel, metrics, logger, status, static, headers, gzip, send, proxy, jobs, temporal

Found repos matching:
- http
- grpc
- centrifuge
- service
- server
- locks \(lock\)
- tcp
- amqp
- kafka
- nats
- sqs
- beanstalk
- boltdb
- memory
- kv
- redis
- memcached
- otel
- metrics
- logger
- status
- headers
- gzip
- send
- proxy \(proxy_ip_parser - related\)
- jobs
- temporal \(not found as separate repo, may be in roadrunner main\)
EOF)

Bash(echo "=== SERVER PLUGIN ===" && \\
head -150 /tmp/server_config.txt && \\
echo "" && \\
echo "=== LOCK PLUGIN ===" && \\
head -150 /tmp/lock_config.txt && \\
echo "" && \\
echo "=== TCP PLUGIN ===" && \\
head -150 /tmp/tcp_config.txt)

Bash(echo "=== AMQP PLUGIN ===" && \\
head -150 /tmp/amqp_config.txt && \\
echo "" && \\
echo "=== KAFKA PLUGIN ===" && \\
head -150 /tmp/kafka_config.txt && \\
echo "" && \\
echo "=== NATS PLUGIN ===" && \\
head -150 /tmp/nats_config.txt)

Bash(echo "=== SQS PLUGIN ===" && \\
head -100 /tmp/sqs_config.txt && \\
echo "" && \\
echo "=== BEANSTALK PLUGIN ===" && \\
head -100 /tmp/beanstalk_config.txt && \\
echo "" && \\
echo "=== BOLTDB PLUGIN ===" && \\
head -100 /tmp/boltdb_config.txt && \\
echo "" && \\
echo "=== MEMORY PLUGIN ===" && \\
head -100 /tmp/memory_config.txt)
